name: Death Prophet
description: What I've seen goes far beyond death. Krobelus, the Death Prophet Creates a spirit link between Death Prophet and an enemy unit, draining health from the enemy.

abilities.name: Witchcraft
abilities.description: Grants self bonus movement speed and cooldown reduction. The bonus component is functional. do not create spirits on attack.

abilities.name: Crypt Swarm
abilities.description: Unleashes evil spirit of Exorcism's corresponding level per enemy unit affected.

abilities.name: Silence
abilities.description: Summons an exorcised banshee of its corresponding level per affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Spirit Siphon
abilities.description: Applies a caster-fear if the affected enemy target is siphoned for a certain amount of time consecutively. Increases max charges. Grants all immediately upon acquiring the ability. Subsequent ability acquisition only grants the remaining charges.

abilities.name: Exorcism
abilities.description: The banshees' damage is less effective on buildings. These Exorcism spirits released via Death Prophet's attacks or abilities deals additional damage compared to its active cast.
